strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive and platform thinking
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research at a recognized scale
Title is Senior/Staff Software Engineer — lacks Principal/Director-level IC track record
No advanced degree and limited cloud-platform strategy or executive advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Years of experience and breadth across stacks
Absence of Principal/Director-level IC scope and strategic advisory work

response.justification: Candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years and recent agentic/MCP work, plus founder experience that signals entrepreneurial drive. However, the role is a Director-level IC focused on AI strategy, customer advisory, and recognized AI expertise — the resume shows no published AI products, platforms, or thought-leadership at that scale, and the career trajectory has not reached Principal/Director IC scope. A solid hands-on engineer, but a stretch for this specific strategic AI leadership position.
